title: Smoked Cod Skewers with Succulent Australian Herbs
description: A delicious and easy-to-make seafood dish featuring smoked cod, succulent Australian herbs, and a hint of smokiness.

ingredients.name: Succulent Australian herbs (such as rosemary, thyme, and parsley)

instructions: 2. In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, minced garlic, and chopped Australian herbs.
3. Season the smoked cod fillets with salt and pepper.
4. Thread the cod fillets onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush the skewers with the herb-oil mixture.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the cod is cooked through.
7. Serve immediately, garnished with lemon wedges.
